title: AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF CAMPACLAN PRIMARY SCHOOL, SIBULAN, NEGROS ORIENTAL, TO MAGSAYSAY MEMORIAL SCHOOL, SIBULAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1658 / 55 OG No. 36, 7631 (September 7, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2478, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF CAMPACLAN PRIMARY SCHOOL, SIBULAN, NEGROS ORIENTAL, TO MAGSAYSAY MEMORIAL SCHOOL, SIBULAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Campaclan Primary School at Sibulan, Negros Oriental, is changed to Magsaysay Memorial School, Sibulan.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
